device_description: Replace with a detailed technical description of your device, including its physical construction, materials, operating principle, and key components. Example: The [Device Name] is a [reusable/single-use], [sterile/non-sterile] medical device designed to [primary function]. It consists of [list key components and materials].
intended_purpose: Replace with the exact intended purpose statement from your Declaration of Conformity or Technical Documentation. Example: The [Device Name] is intended for use in [clinical context] to [specific function]. It is intended for use by [user type] in [use environment].
indications_for_use: Replace with your first indication for use
Replace with your second indication for use
contraindications: Add additional contraindications as needed; use 'None stated in the CER' if none
target_patient_population: Replace with your target patient population description. Example: Adult patients diagnosed with [condition] who are assessed by a [specialist] as suitable for [procedure type].
intended_user_profile: Replace with your intended user profile. Example: Trained healthcare professionals, including [list specialties], familiar with [relevant procedures or techniques].
eu_mdr_classification_and_rule: EU Class [I/IIa/IIb/III] under EU MDR 2017/745, Rule [X]
uk_mdr_classification_and_rule: UK Class [I/IIa/IIb/III] under UK MDR 2002 (as amended 2024), or 'Not applicable' if device is not on the GB market
uk_responsible_person: Replace with UK Responsible Person name and address, or 'Not applicable'
ukca_marking_status: Replace with UKCA marking status (e.g., 'UKCA marked', 'CE marking accepted under transitional provisions', 'Not applicable')
emdn_code: Replace with your EMDN code or 'Not applicable'

device_lifetime.shelf_life: Replace with shelf life or 'Not applicable'
device_lifetime.expected_service_life: Replace with expected service life (e.g., '5 years')

market_history: Replace with a narrative of your device's market history, including first launch date, regulatory clearances, cumulative sales context, and any significant post-market events. Example: The [Device Name] was first launched and CE marked in [year], with prior FDA 510(k) clearance ([K-number]) obtained in [date].

pms_plan_document.title: Post Market Surveillance Report for [Your Device Name]

pmcf_plan_document.title: Replace with PMCF plan title or rationale for why PMCF is not required

other_associated_documents: TDXXX – Technical Documentation for [Your Device Name]
